info.title: Amazon Experts 后端接口文档
info.description: Amazon Experts 后端服务的 Swagger/OpenAPI 文档。平台侧接口不需要 x-tenant-id；租户侧接口需要在请求头中传入 x-tenant-id。

schema.title: Response Login Api V1 Auth Login Post
Response Refresh Api V1 Auth Refresh Post
Response Register Api V1 Users Register Post
Response Activate Platform User Api V1 Users Platform Activate Post

get.summary: 获取当前租户用户列表

schema.title: Response List Llm Models Api V1 Models Llm Get
Response Get Embedding Model Api V1 Models Embedding Get
Response Metrics Api V1 Ops Metrics Get

post.description:
Run the object-storage garbage collection passes and report what each reclaimed.

The reclamation methods on DocumentService are otherwise only reachable from code; this is the
operational entry point (call it from a cron via the `system:ops` permission). Each pass is
idempotent and best-effort by object key, so repeated runs are safe and a partial failure is
retried on the next call. See KNOWLEDGE_BASE_STORAGE_AND_BUILD_DESIGN.md section 11.

schema.title: Response Run Storage Gc Api V1 Ops Storage Gc Post
Response Create Session Api V1 Chat Sessions Post
Response List Sessions Api V1 Chat Sessions Get
Response List Messages Api V1 Chat Sessions  Session Id  Messages Get
Response Rename Session Api V1 Chat Sessions  Session Id  Title Patch
